name: GraniteShares 3x Long FATANG Daily ETC
summary: GraniteShares 3x Long FATANG Daily ETC is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) that aims to provide investors with three times the daily performance of a basket of FATANG stocks (Facebook, Apple, Tesla, Amazon, Netflix, Google). The ETC is designed for short-term trading and carries significant risk. The issuer is GraniteShares.
